section_name: Proof of financial responsibility not required after February first, nineteen hundred fifty-seven
text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, no person, on and after February first, nineteen hundred fifty-seven, shall be required to file or maintain proof of financial responsibility pursuant to this article.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 3
#### Article 7. Motor Vehicle Safety Responsibility Act
##### § 346 — Proof of financial responsibility not required after February first, nineteen hundred fifty-seven

Notwithstanding any other provision of law, no person, on and after February first, nineteen hundred fifty-seven, shall be required to file or maintain proof of financial responsibility pursuant to this article.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
